titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Olin, Kroch, Uris Libraries administrative records13-1-3356
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-05-20 18:00:56 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Olin, Kroch, Uris Libraries administrative records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, reports, financial records, photographs, videotapes, and subject files
did.abstract: Correspondence, reports, statistics, policies, financial records, photographs, videotapes, and subject files relating to advisory groups, conservation, automation and the general administrative operations of the Olin, Kroch, Uris (OKU) libraries.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, reports, statistics, policies, financial records, photographs, videotapes, and subject files relating to advisory groups, conservation, automation and the general administrative operations of the Olin, Kroch, Uris (OKU) libraries.

arrangement.head: COLLECTION ARRANGEMENT
arrangement.p: The collection retains its original arrangement.

emph.ref: Series X. Development and Public Affairs
Series XIX: Statistics and General Data

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Olin, Kroch, Uris Libraries' Administrative Records, #13-1-3356. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also Cornell University Library records, #13-1-1082.
